title: Minio S3 Node connection error
symptom: When attempting to upload to Minio using the S3 node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading ‘_)'.
root_cause: The error arises because the S3 node is not configured correctly for Minio. Specifically, the 'Force Path Style' setting is not enabled, which is required for proper communication with Minio's S3-compatible API.
fix_steps: Go to the S3 Credential settings in n8n
agent_instruction: Enable 'Force Path Style' in the S3 Credential settings for Minio.
